home.eyebrow: A youth career platform for Azerbaijan
home.title: Keep internships, trainee tracks, and junior roles in one clean place.
home.copy: CareerApple brings verified employer profiles and selected openings into one clear, fast feed for early-career talent. Browse, filter, and reach the right opportunities sooner.
home.platformSignalsTitle: Search with less noise and more confidence
home.ctaTitle: Reach the right junior talent faster.
home.ctaCopy: CareerApple helps companies show up with more clarity, reach early-career candidates faster, and earn stronger first intent from the right audience.
home.feature1Copy: Search by city, level, work model, and keywords. Internship and junior roles stay easy to track.
home.feature2Copy: Move through standout opportunities in visual cards and jump straight into the role that feels right.
home.feature3Copy: A soft blue badge next to each company name shows that the profile is clear, trusted, and ready to explore.
home.feature4Copy: Early-career roles from different places come together here in a cleaner format that is easier to scan and compare.

jobsPage.title: Filter open roles for early-career talent and apply faster
jobsPage.copy: Use the filters below to view internships, trainee tracks, junior roles, and graduate-friendly openings in one place.
jobsPage.newInternshipsTitle: New internship openings for young talent
jobsPage.featuredEmployersTitle: See the market through selected employers
jobsPage.emptyTitle: No matching roles were found for these filters
jobsPage.emptyCopy: Relax the filters and try again, or change your keyword.

companiesPage.title: Verified employer profiles for early-career talent
companiesPage.copy: The companies shown on CareerApple stand out for clear positioning, trusted information, and strong relevance for early-career candidates.
companiesPage.filteredCopy: This list has been automatically filtered from the sector menu in the navbar.
companiesPage.emptyTitle: No companies are visible for this category right now
companiesPage.emptyCopy: Choose another sector or return to the full companies list.

companyPage.overviewPlaceholder: This space is reserved for a short, clear introduction that helps candidates understand the company faster.
companyPage.focusTitle: Where this employer is most active right now
companyPage.youthOfferTitle: What the company offers for interns and junior candidates
companyPage.jobsTitle: Roles currently open across the {name} team
companyPage.vibeSectionTitle: See the team’s rhythm, tools, and perk map at a glance
companyPage.techStackTitle: The tools shaping the team’s daily flow
companyPage.cultureTitle: Signals that make the day-to-day feel better
companyPage.vibeTitle: Three cues that define the culture best
companyPage.emptyTitle: There is no active role visible for this company right now
companyPage.emptyCopy: When a new opening is added, it will appear on this page.

jobDetail.whatYouWillDo: What you will do in this role
jobDetail.aiSummaryCopy: Understand the role in seconds and decide faster whether it fits you.
jobDetail.aiSummaryCultureFallback: {company} expects a {workModel} rhythm with strong ownership from this role.

savedPage.title: Keep your saved roles in one place
savedPage.copy: Roles you want to revisit stay here so you can compare, reopen, and apply when you are ready.
savedPage.emptyCopy: Tap Save on a job card and it will appear here.

outbound.title: You are being redirected to {company}'s official page...
outbound.copy: You will reach the official application page in a moment. This short screen keeps the transition clear and smooth.
outbound.fallbackCta: If you are not redirected automatically, click here
outbound.invalidTitle: This outbound link is not valid
outbound.invalidCopy: The URL could not be verified or does not use a safe format. Return to jobs and start the redirect again.

playbook.title: Keep your first-job plan in sharp, practical cards
playbook.copy: Fast micro-guides for interviews, CVs, portfolios, outreach, and the moments that decide momentum.
playbook.gridTitle: The most useful playbook cards this week
playbook.ctaTitle: Read the playbook, then move into the right role
playbook.ctaCopy: Every card is written to lead into action: either sharpen the application or choose the next job with more conviction.

employersPage.title: Build a stronger hiring experience for early-career talent.
employersPage.copy: CareerApple helps companies show up clearly, reach the right junior audience sooner, and earn better quality applications from early-career candidates.
employersPage.feature1Copy: Present internships, trainee tracks, and junior roles in a way that helps the right candidates find them faster.
employersPage.feature2Copy: A clearer role story, stronger links, and better presentation help candidate intent form sooner.
employersPage.feature3Copy: Company pages feel more polished, more credible, and more aligned with what early-career talent wants to see.
employersPage.ctaTitle: Present your team with more confidence and meet the right candidates sooner.
employersPage.ctaCopy: CareerApple helps employers turn open roles into a cleaner, more premium experience for early-career talent.

footer.introTitle: The early-career platform for internships and first jobs
footer.introCopy: CareerApple brings internship, trainee, and junior openings together with verified employer profiles in one premium platform for early-career talent.

info.platformFlowTitle: What this page helps you do
info.platformFlowCopy1: This section is designed to help you reach the right jobs, companies, and guidance with less noise.
info.platformFlowCopy2: Every page is shaped to make choosing, comparing, and applying feel faster and clearer.
info.nextStepCopy: CareerApple resource pages are built to move you forward quickly, from reading into the right job, employer, or next step.
